title: Mo' Guns
description: An addon mod for Mr. Crayfish's Gun Mod.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/FIEFFAI.png)
A simple yet fun add-on for Mr. Crayfish's Gun Mod that aims to have balanced visuals and be as fun as possible!

# Looking for 1.20.1?
Take a look at [Mo' Than Enough Guns](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-than-enough-guns/versions)!
#
